name: Arbuckle RV Resort
summary_text: A modern RV resort in Davis, Oklahoma, offering spacious full-hookup sites and an excellent basecamp for exploring Turner Falls Park, the Chickasaw National Recreation Area, and the Arbuckle Mountains.

siteFeatures.level: Large, level concrete pull-through and back-in sites.
otherNotes: A newer resort with spacious sites.

starlink.notes: Very open skies with virtually no tree obstructions.

petNotes.walkingAreas: Wide roads and grassy areas provide plenty of room for walking dogs.
petNotes.dogFriendlyTrails: Nearby trails in Chickasaw National Recreation Area allow leashed pets in many areas.
petNotes.petRestrictions: Pets must remain leashed outside the dog park.
petNotes.hazards: Limited shade and hot pavement during the summer.
petNotes.notes: A very pet-friendly resort with excellent walking space and a dedicated dog park.

emergencyVeterinarian.name: Oklahoma Veterinary Specialists
emergencyVeterinarian.address: 1501 North Santa Fe Avenue, Edmond, OK 73003

tripTips: This is a great overnight stop when traveling through southern Oklahoma.
If you have extra time, plan to visit Turner Falls Park and Chickasaw National Recreation Area—they're close by and worth exploring.
If severe weather is in the forecast, know that the resort has an underground tornado shelter for guests.
Some sites overlook a small pond, making for a much prettier stay than you'd expect from an overnight stop.
Bring bicycles to explore the nearby area.
Reserve a pull-through site if you're staying only one night.
